retry_reason: If refcount_inc_not_zero fails, the object's refcount is already zero (object is dead/dying); retrying will not revive the object.
contract_summary: Acquire a reference on a BPF kptr by incrementing its refcount via refcount_inc_not_zero. Returns the same pointer on success, or NULL if the object's refcount is zero (object is being freed). The caller must check the return value and, if non-NULL, must later release the reference with the corresponding bpf_refcount_release (or equivalent) function. The operation is conditional on the object being alive — once the refcount hits zero, the object is no longer accessible.
